Name: Lothian League
Description: The Lothian League is a small Periphery realm composed of ice-and-snow planets located beyond the outer reaches of the Free Worlds League.
ReputationStatements: Get the job done and you'll be paid. Don't mistake our hospitality for friendship.
The weather's bad, the situation's worse, and now I'm dealing with contractors.
Winter doesn't care about excuses, and neither do I.
The League military is capable, but thin on Mechs. We could use a contractor.
You've earned a measure of trust. Don't squander it.
You work hard, complain little, and keep your word. That's enough for me.
You fight like people used to hard living. The League respects that.
MissionSuccessStatements: That's one less problem for folks trying to survive out here. You earned your pay today.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Nobody's happy with the outcome. Doesn't mean I blame you.
BadFaithFailureStatements: The weather didn't beat you. The enemy didn't beat you. You beat yourself.
